_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: AAV9-GRDC24 showed no significant therapeutic effects when administered IV at the same 10^12 vg dose and resulted in mortalities in mice between days 15 and 21 of treatment, which was not observed with AAV-K55-GRDC24
details: AAV9-GRDC24 resulted in mortalities between days 15 and 21 of treatment at 10^12 vg dose, which was not observed with AAV-K55-GRDC24
